_comment: GENERATED from src/lib/catalog.ts by scripts/gen-catalog.ts - do not hand-edit. Regenerate: npm run gen:catalog

entries.name: Citrix Workspace
entries.note: Self-extracting; the switches live in the inner bootstrapper. Add /includeSSON for pass-through SSO, and ADDLOCAL="ReceiverInside,ICA_Client,USB,DesktopViewer,WebHelper" to pick components.

entries.name: Microsoft Teams (classic machine-wide)
entries.note: The machine-wide MSI only PROVISIONS a per-user install at each logon. New Teams uses teamsbootstrapper.exe -p instead.

entries.name: AnyDesk
entries.note: Custom CLI (not MSI-style). --install REQUIRES the target folder as an argument.

entries.name: Docker Desktop
entries.note: Sub-command style (install/uninstall as a verb, not a slash flag). --accept-license is required for unattended.

entries.name: Adobe Acrobat Reader
entries.note: /sAll silent, /rs suppress reboot, /msi forwards the rest to the inner MSI. EULA_ACCEPT=YES is mandatory.

entries.name: CrowdStrike Falcon Sensor
entries.note: CID (customer ID + checksum) is REQUIRED - without it the sensor installs but never registers.

entries.name: Python
entries.note: Custom bootstrapper; properties are bare NAME=value (no slash). Add Include_test=0 to skip the test suite.

entries.name: Visual Studio Code
entries.note: Inno Setup. /MERGETASKS=!runcode stops it launching after install; add addcontextmenufiles,addtopath for shell integration + PATH.

entries.name: Git for Windows
entries.note: Inno Setup. Use /LOADINF="config.inf" to preset components/options (record one with /SAVEINF).

entries.name: Zoom
entries.note: Use the MSI (not the per-user exe) for fleet deploys; pass ZConfig/ZoomAutoUpdate properties for config.

entries.name: Oracle VM VirtualBox
entries.note: Qt-based custom installer. --silent + --ignore-reboot; the network-driver install can still prompt unless the Oracle cert is pre-trusted in the cert store.

entries.name: Wireshark
entries.note: NSIS. Bundles Npcap, which runs its own installer - add /quiet and let it through.

entries.name: TeamViewer (Host)
entries.note: Add APITOKEN=<token> CUSTOMCONFIGID=<id> ASSIGNMENTOPTIONS="..." to auto-assign the Host to your account.

entries.name: GlobalProtect (Palo Alto VPN)
entries.note: PORTAL= preconfigures the gateway so users aren't prompted.

entries.name: Microsoft 365 Apps / Office
entries.note: Office has NO plain silent switch - it installs via the Office Deployment Tool (setup.exe) driven by a config.xml. Author the XML at config.office.com (channel, bitness, apps, language), ship it next to setup.exe. "{file} /download config.xml" pre-stages the bits first.

entries.name: Adobe Acrobat (Pro / Standard)
entries.note: Same flags as Reader (/sAll silent, /rs suppress reboot, /msi forwards to the inner MSI; EULA_ACCEPT=YES mandatory). Volume licensing comes from the package built in the Adobe Admin Console, not a command-line key.

entries.name: Foxit PDF Editor
entries.note: KEYCODE= (your volume license) is REQUIRED to activate - without it it installs as an unlicensed trial. Add MAKEDEFAULT=0 so it doesn't grab the PDF association.

entries.name: Nitro PDF Pro
entries.note: SERIALNUMBER= is REQUIRED to activate; without it you get trial mode.

entries.name: TechSmith Snagit
entries.note: TSC_SOFTWARE_KEY= the software key. TechSmith's Deployment Tool emits an .mst - apply it with TRANSFORMS="snagit.mst" to also kill auto-update + the welcome screen.

entries.name: Webroot SecureAnywhere
entries.note: Tiny stub installer; /key= (your 20-char keycode) is REQUIRED to register the endpoint, /silent suppresses UI. Add /lockautouninstall=<password> to require a password to remove it.

entries.name: RustDesk
entries.note: Custom double-dash CLI (not MSI-style). --silent-install installs + registers the service. Drop a RustDesk2.toml beside the exe to preconfigure the relay/key.

entries.name: ESET Endpoint Security
entries.note: Bare MSI installs the client but it won't be MANAGED - for unattended enrollment layer the ESET PROTECT config (a generated .mst / install_config.ini) via TRANSFORMS=. A reboot is usually required.

entries.name: Google Chrome (Enterprise)
entries.note: Use the Enterprise MSI, not the consumer stub exe, for fleet deploys.

entries.name: Mozilla Firefox
entries.note: NSIS. Drop a policies.json / use the MSI for managed settings.

entries.name: Notepad++
entries.note: NSIS. /allusers installs machine-wide (HKLM, Program Files); drop it for a per-user install.

entries.name: OBS Studio
entries.note: NSIS.

entries.name: GIMP
entries.note: Inno Setup.
